summary: International user ESPN Sunday Night Baseball archive - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is located outside the United States
AND the subscriber is entitled for archive game playback

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses an archived ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon doesn't display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay of the team match up
AND a blackout pill does not display in the game tile
